summary: Comprehensive testing of Layouts de Importação Excel and Regras de Processamento feature completed. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed - layout creation, listing, detail page, rules CRUD, and edit functionality all working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/import-layouts - Lista layouts
✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/import-layouts?cnpj=xxx - Filtro por CNPJ
✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/import-layouts/campos-disponiveis - Campos para mapeamento
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/import-layouts - Criar layout com CNPJ válido (11222333000181)
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/import-layouts - Rejeita CNPJ inválido (400)
✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/import-layouts/{id} - Obter layout por ID
✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/import-layouts/{id} - Retorna 404 para ID inexistente
✅ Backend: PUT /api/v1/import-layouts/{id} - Atualizar layout (nome, ativo, colunas)
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/import-layouts/{id}/clone - Clonar layout
✅ Backend: DELETE /api/v1/import-layouts/{id} - Deletar layout
✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/import-layouts/{layout_id}/rules - Lista regras de um layout
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/import-layouts/{layout_id}/rules - Criar regra tipo filtro
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/import-layouts/{layout_id}/rules - Criar regra tipo transformação
✅ Backend: POST /api/v1/import-layouts/{layout_id}/rules - Criar regra tipo validação
✅ Backend: PUT /api/v1/import-layouts/{layout_id}/rules/{rule_id} - Atualizar regra
✅ Backend: DELETE /api/v1/import-layouts/{layout_id}/rules/{rule_id} - Deletar regra
✅ Backend: GET /api/v1/import-layouts/{layout_id}/rules/{rule_id} - Obter regra específica
✅ Backend: Layout total_regras contador atualiza corretamente
✅ Backend: DELETE layout cascades to delete rules
✅ Frontend: Navigation sidebar shows 'Layouts' link with correct icon
✅ Frontend: /layouts page loads with correct title 'Layouts de Importação'
✅ Frontend: Empty state displayed when no layouts exist
✅ Frontend: 'Novo Layout' and 'Atualizar' buttons present and clickable
✅ Frontend: CNPJ filter dropdown appears when CNPJs exist
✅ Frontend: /layouts/novo form page loads with all required fields
✅ Frontend: Layout form - CNPJ, Nome, Descrição inputs work correctly
✅ Frontend: Layout form - Config planilha section (nome_aba, linha_cabecalho, linha_inicio)
✅ Frontend: Layout form - Add/remove column functionality works
✅ Frontend: Layout form - Campo destino dropdown populated from campos-disponiveis
✅ Frontend: Layout form - Save creates layout and redirects to list
✅ Frontend: Layout cards display with correct info (nome, CNPJ, colunas, regras)
✅ Frontend: Layout card buttons (toggle, edit, clone, rules, delete) work
✅ Frontend: /layouts/{id} detail page shows colunas table
✅ Frontend: /layouts/{id} detail page shows 'Nova Regra' button
✅ Frontend: Empty rules state displayed when no rules
✅ Frontend: Rule form inline appears when clicking 'Nova Regra'
✅ Frontend: Rule form - Nome, Tipo, Descrição, Condições, Ação fields work
✅ Frontend: Rule creation saves and shows rule card with SE/ENTÃO format
✅ Frontend: Rule cards show edit/delete buttons
✅ Frontend: /layouts/{id}/editar page loads with pre-filled data
✅ Frontend: Edit page - CNPJ input is disabled (non-editable)
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests. No persistent test data left.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Layouts and Rules feature fully tested. All CRUD operations for both layouts and rules work correctly. The layout form supports column mapping with campo_destino dropdown from /api/v1/import-layouts/campos-disponiveis. Rules support types: filtro, transformacao, validacao, enriquecimento. Condition operators include: igual, diferente, maior, menor, contem, vazio, etc. Action types include: excluir, definir_valor, maiuscula, etc.

mocked_apis.email_sender: Email sending is mocked (not tested in this iteration)
